item.title: Sekiro: No Defeat premieres September 4 in Japan
item.content:encoded:
• Anime

A three-week theatrical run.

Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice anime adaptation Sekiro: No Defeat will premiere on September 4 in Japan with a three-week theatrical run, Kadokawa Corporation, Crunchyroll, Qzil.la, and ARCH announced.

The main visual was also revealed:

It was previously announced that the anime will stream exclusively on Crunchyroll worldwide, excluding Japan, China, Korea, Russian, and Belarus. A global premiere date has yet to be announced.

Here is the story synopsis, via Crunchyroll:

Japan is fractured into many independent nations entangled in ceaseless war. At the center lies Ashina, a land of sacred earth and ancient mystery. Two decades after Sword Saint Isshin Ashina reclaimed the region in a brutal coup, a new threat emerges from within: The Interior Ministry. Desperate to protect his homeland, Isshin’s grandson Genichiro turns to forbidden powers. The only hope lies in a kidnapped boy—the Divine Heir—and his silent protector: a loyal shinobi known only as Sekiro.

This is the story of a lord and his retainer—and their quest to restore balance to a nation on the edge.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/sekiro-no-defeat-premieres-september-4-in-japan
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok ‘Meet the Crew’ trailers – Gallanza and Maglielle
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch 2

The Silver Wolf and Alluring Swordmaster.

Publisher Cygames and developer Cygames Osaka have released a new set of “Meet the Crew” trailers for Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok, introducing new playable characters Gallanza (voiced by Crispin Freeman in English, Koichi Yamadera in Japanese) and Maglielle (voiced by Debi Derryberry in English, Saori Hayami in Japanese).

Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok is due out for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam on July 9.

Watch the trailers below.

Meet the Crew: Gallanza

English

Japanese

Meet the Crew: Maglielle

English

Japanese
